summary: Iteration 35: Verified all 4 requested changes - feedback settings, school name truncation, Outlook sync window, and auto-complete scheduler. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). UI tests confirmed feedback tab with toggle, default items, and custom questions (max 5). Bookings page shows 46 completed reservations with only 1 confirmed (future date), proving scheduler works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Programs API returns feedback_enabled (default true) and feedback_questions (default []) fields
VERIFIED: Programs can be updated with feedback_enabled=true/false and custom feedback_questions
VERIFIED: Feedback tab visible in program edit dialog with toggle, default feedback items (stars + recommend), and custom question editor
VERIFIED: Custom questions limited to max 5, with types: text, scale, yesno (PRO feature)
VERIFIED: Outlook sync window is dynamic: max(max_days_before_booking) + 60 day buffer, minimum 180 days
VERIFIED: School name in bookings list has truncate CSS (min-w-0 + truncate classes at line 1010-1012)
VERIFIED: Scheduler auto-completes confirmed reservations with past dates - only 1 confirmed reservation exists (future date 2026-06-02)
VERIFIED: 46 completed reservations exist, proving scheduler has been running correctly
VERIFIED: Login flow works with httpOnly cookies
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested changes verified: 1) Feedback settings (feedback_enabled, feedback_questions) work on programs API and UI. 2) School name truncation CSS fix in BookingsPage.js line 1010-1012. 3) Outlook sync window is dynamic based on max_days_before_booking + 60 buffer (min 180 days) in microsoft_calendar.py line 445-465. 4) Scheduler auto-completes confirmed past reservations - only 1 confirmed reservation exists for future date.
